claimText: Ghaziabad Nagar Nigam issued India's first certified Green Municipal Bond (GMB).
evidenceExcerpt: Ghaziabad Nagar Nigam pioneered India's first certified GMB issued under Swachh Bharat Mission-Urban
examUse: Fact-based statement in Prelims regarding first-of-its-kind financial instruments in India.

claimText: Municipal bonds are non-convertible debt securities issued by bodies entrusted with functions under Article 243W of the Constitution.
evidenceExcerpt: Municipal bonds refer to non-convertible debt securities issued by municipal body or others established for such purposes and entrusted with functions under Article 243W of Constitution.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the constitutional provision and financial nature of municipal bonds.

claimText: Green bonds are financial instruments used to raise funds specifically for climate mitigation, adaptation, and other environment-friendly projects.
evidenceExcerpt: Green bonds are used to raise funds specifically for climate mitigation, adaptation and other environment friendly projects.
examUse: Definition-based question on the specific end-use of Green bonds.

claimText: The Tertiary Sewage Treatment Plant (TSTP) funded by the Ghaziabad Green Municipal Bond was developed under the Public-Private Hybrid Annuity Model (PPP-HAM).
evidenceExcerpt: TSTP was developed under Public-Private Hybrid Annuity Model (PPP-HAM).
examUse: Statement-based question on the financing and execution models of urban infrastructure projects.
